creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
perl-after-upgrade delves into the +CONTENTS files which are no longer
relevant with pkgng. This either needs to be fixed or deprecated because
as it stands its usefulness and utility is misleading.

How-To-Repeat: - Install lang/perl5.12.
- Install net/p5-libwww
- Deinstall lang/perl5.12.
- Install lang/perl5.14.
- perl -e 'require LWP::Simple; print LWP::Simple::get("http://www.google.com")'
